title: Second staged candidate fetch and ingest (mock, queue rank #2)
problem: Tickets 142–151 prove the Phase 3 mock spine for OpenAlex candidate rank #1 (W2741809807). Operators cannot fetch and ingest-staged the second ranked candidate (W1234567890) from the same discover fixture with deterministic mock network.
acceptance_criteria: Unit test discovers and enqueues both OpenAlex fixture candidates, fetches rank #2 (disc_openalex_W1234567890), and ingests-staged without duplicating rank #1 artifacts.
Mock HTML fixture for second candidate; no live network in default pytest.
Structured JSON status for fetch and ingest-staged; stable source row counts on re-run.
Golden tests remain mock-only and pass.
non_goals: Extract/link/build spine for second source (defer to follow-on ticket).
rollback_plan: Remove second-candidate test; retain ticket-151 idempotency proof.
